overview: Lucky Draw 2D 3D 4D is a mobile lottery game where players log in with their phone number and place bets on 2D, 3D, and 4D numbers across three daily draws (A, B, C). The admin manages player balances and enters draw results from the ControlHub dashboard, with players seeing results update automatically every 2-3 seconds.
features: Mobile number login — one device per player
ABC draw selection for each game type
Bet types: Straight, Box, SP, DP for 3D/4D with different payouts
Motor button to bet all numbers, Lucky button for random picks
Bet slip with rate picker and potential winnings display
Live results bar polling every 2.5 seconds
Admin result entry with auto-settlement of bets
